user_reviews.Name: Handi Suyadi
user_reviews.Description:
Karakter Rasa Bukan untuk Semua

(Beli pada 2 Maret 2024)

Gamchi termasuk penjual Korean Potato Bread yang populer. Mengklaim diri sebagai penjual pertama mungkin berperan dalam menarik perhatian konsumen. Sebab sejauh ini belum ada kompetitor yang sepadan dengan Gamchi.

Terdapat berbagai varian rasa yang ditawarkan. Hanya saja, masih diperlukan diferensiasi produk lebih jelas agar kue mudah dibedakan.

Gamchi Ubee (5/10)
Sayang sekali rasa ube sama sekali tidak terasa. Rasanya nyaris tak ada bedanya dengan Gamchi Double Mozza. Hanya warna ungu sebagai pembeda. Dapat diasumsikan kue tersa manis karena menggunakan ube, tapi rasa yang dapat dirasakan justru asin dan gurih. Sekalipun dikasih ube bubuk tetap tidak ada gunanya.
Setiap menu disajikan beserta gula halus dan ube bubuk.

Gamchi Double Mozza (8.5/10)
Double Mozza? Ya, banyak keju mozzarella pada permukaan kue. Karakter rasa kue yang asin dan gurih jauh lebih pas untuk menu ini.
Dibandingkan dengan Gamchi Ubee, rasa kue jauh lebih baik. Keberadaan keju mozzarella membuat kue menjadi gurih. Walaupun jumlahnya banyak, tidak bikin eneg. Tambah nikmat disantap dalam keadaan hangat.
Setiap menu disajikan beserta seledri kering, saus Korean Barbeque dan cabe bubuk.

Karakter rasa kue termasuk tipe yang belum tentu bisa cocok untuk semua orang. Tidak semua orang bisa menerima tekstur yang legit dan rasa yang tidak umum.

Setiap pembelian mendapat satu buah sarung tangan plastik.

user_reviews.text_translated:
Flavor Not for Everyone

(Purchased on March 2, 2024)

Gamchi is a popular seller of Korean Potato Bread. Claiming to be the first seller may have played a role in attracting consumers, as so far there haven't been any competitors comparable to Gamchi.

There are various flavors on offer. However, clearer product differentiation is needed to make the cakes easily distinguishable.

Gamchi Ubee (5/10)
Unfortunately, the ube flavor is completely absent. It tastes almost the same as Gamchi Double Mozza. The purple color is the only difference. One might assume the cake tastes sweet because of the ube, but the flavor is actually salty and savory. Even adding ube powder would be pointless.
Each dish is served with powdered sugar and ube powder.

Gamchi Double Mozza (8.5/10)
Double Mozza? Yes, there's plenty of mozzarella cheese on the surface of the cake. The salty and savory flavors of the cake are much more fitting for this dish.
Compared to Gamchi Ubee, the cake tastes much better. The mozzarella cheese adds a savory flavor. Despite the large amount, it's not overwhelming. It's even more delicious when eaten warm.
Each dish is served with dried celery, Korean barbecue sauce, and chili powder.

The cake's flavor isn't for everyone. Not everyone can handle the chewy texture and unusual flavor.

With each purchase, you'll receive a pair of plastic gloves.

parking was terrible. too small.

user_reviews.text_translated: The signature milk coffee is really delicious (I forgot to take a picture 😭). A creamy type of milk coffee, but still has a strong coffee flavor. On top is sweet whipped cream (similar to Kopi Toko Djawa's cloud milk coffee), and there is a hint of cinnamon. Try the earl grey tea, topped with whipped cream too, but the whipped cream is sour and refreshing, unique. Plus there is grated lemon peel on top, making the aroma really delicious. Plus try the matcha latte for only 28 thousand rupiah, where other matchas are around 45-50 thousand rupiah. Definitely will come back again! 😍

user_reviews.text_translated:
If you want to satisfy your cravings for tteokbokki at an affordable price, try Wonbokki 🥘

Just buy the Mala Rose or Rose, the small size is enough. Especially with the Cheese Kimbap, it's filling 😋

In terms of taste, neither of these is spicy, just warm from the tteokbokki seasoning. It already comes with tteokbokki, eomuk, glass noodles, and mozzarella. You can add mozzarella if you prefer it cheesy 🧀

This place is like a food court, so there are lots of other food options in one place. There's a prayer room and restrooms, but cleanliness is a bit lacking 😕

There's plenty of seating, but it doesn't seem to be separated into smoking and non-smoking areas. It's safe to eat when it's not too busy 👍🏻

Hopefully, they'll expand the flavor options next time 🙌🏻

user_reviews.text_translated: Hi sis! I want to give a little feedback. I bought the medium sized Mala Rose Tteokbokki earlier. It tastes really good, it's really creamy but the mala flavor is still there, the aroma of the spices is also strong but not too much. The sauce is also not too thick but not too runny either, just right in my opinion. The tteok is also chewy, not hard, but not like cilok. The odeng is also delicious, you can taste the fish, not just the dough. The sweet potato noodles are also delicious. But there is one minus that has a big impact in my opinion, namely the composition. The portion I got earlier, honestly, was really a lot of sweet potato noodles, not comparable to the tteok which can be counted on one hand. Even though the title says I want to eat tteokbokki.. but this actually feels like the tteok is just a topping for the sweet potato noodles because there are so many and the ratio is not balanced. I don't know if this is how it is or if I'm just unlucky, but honestly, it's quite disappointing for me, whose title is to eat tteokbokki instead of sweet potato noodles. Even though I'm happy that there are sweet potato noodles, but if the ratio is like that.. it makes me a bit disappointed too :(. My suggestion is to increase the tteok and reduce the sweet potato noodles, but if the portion of the sweet potato noodles is like that, then increase the tteok. Because what I got earlier was honestly very little huhu, I don't think it was even 10.. even though the tteok was small in size, right?

user_reviews.Name: Angie Katarina
user_reviews.Description:
My first time cobain mala rose tteokbokki. Untung mereka punya personal size, karena selama ini banyak yg jual kayak porsi rame sharing gitu huhu.

Setelah cobain aku bisa bilang worth it sih. Pesan yg size small, harganya per 2025 di 35rb nett. Isiannya ada mie japchae gitu, fish cake, dan tteok. Bisa add on gimmari gorengan atau mozza atau sosis ya.

Buat harga segitu jujur aku ga expect apa-apa hahahaha. Ternyata, porsinya lumayan lho, ga kecil! Mie nya lumayan banyak, sausnya pekat kental, mala nya berasa berpadu dengan saus rose nya, jujur weird (karena aku ga pernah coba kombinasi ini sebelumnya) tapi enak unik! Rasanya ga murahan.

Semoga konsisten terus ya secara konsistensi saus serta rasa dll, supaya valid review nya hahaha, karena sempat lihat postingan mereka kok sausnya lebih ke encer, sementara aku dapat yg lekoh banget.

Boleh dicoba ya. Bisa pesan lewat ojek online atau chat mereka.

user_reviews.text_translated:
My first time trying mala rose tteokbokki. Luckily, they have a personal size, because so many people sell it as a shared portion, huhu.

After trying it, I can say it's worth it. I ordered the small size, which is 35,000 rupiah nett per 2025. The filling includes japchae noodles, fish cakes, and tteok. You can add fried gimmari, mozzarella, or sausage.

Honestly, for that price, I wasn't expecting much, haha. It turns out, the portion is quite good, not small! The noodles are quite generous, the sauce is thick, and the mala blends nicely with the rose sauce. Honestly, it's weird (because I've never tried this combination before), but it's uniquely delicious! It doesn't taste cheap.

Hopefully, they'll maintain the consistency of the sauce and flavor, etc., so the review will be valid, haha. I saw their post that the sauce was more runny, while I got the very soft one.

It's worth a try. You can order via online motorcycle taxis or chat with them.
